name: UBA : Terminated User Activity
notes:
Detects activity from any user that is listed as terminated or resigned in the UBA : Terminated Users reference table. 
**NOTE this rule does not ignore any log sources.***
conditions_text: when the event matches Username is not N/A
when any of Username are contained in any of UBA : Terminated Users - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Terminated User Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches Username is not N/A
AND when any of Username are contained in any of UBA : Terminated Users - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Terminated User Activity
